zh.lifeSummary: Donal Maol Mac Carthy Reagh, Lord of Carbery是Domhnall Got Mac Cárthaigh King of Desmond的兒子，於1214年出生。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1310年享年96歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Donal Maol Mac Carthy Reagh, Lord of Carbery是Domhnall Got Mac Cárthaigh King of Desmond的儿子，于1214年出生。他至少有1个儿子。他去世于1310年享年96岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Cuong, Minh, Lien, Muoi, Thanh, Tho, Tieu, Vinh, Anh, Beo, Binh, Chau.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 麥 (see   Mai   2) and 莫 (see   Mo   1).
Vietnamese (Mạc): from Chinese 莫 ‘nothing; nonexistent’; see Mo 1.

variants.name: Mai
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Thanh, Hoa, Son, Dung, Long, Binh, Minh, Thu, Hue, Huong, Thuy.  Chinese Chi, Hong, Ho, Sang, Han, Hang, Jian, Li, Man, Mei, Sen, Wei.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 麥, meaning ‘wheat’ in Chinese: (i) from Mai Qiu (麥丘), the title of a man in the state of Qi (located mainly in present-day Shandong province) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), who, despite being very old, came to celebrate the birthday of the Duke Huan of Qi (ruler of the state of Qi, died 643  BC ). His descendants inherited 麥, the first part of his title, as their surname. (ii) borne by descendants of Mai Tie Zhang (麥鐵杖), a famous general during the Sui dynasty (581–618  AD ). His descendants were scattered around southern China.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 買, meaning ‘buy’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of the king Song Weizi, founder of the state of Song. (ii) borne by descendants of the Duke Dao of Xu (ruler of the state of Xu, 546–523  BC ), possibly inheriting his personal name. (iii) from the first element of the personal name Mai Zhu Chu (買朱鉏), style name of an official who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iv) it has also been traced back to other ethnic groups in northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Carthy
meanings: Car, dear, and tir, a country, and ać for neać, an individual, originally cartać, meaning a beloved countryman
Irish: A beloved countryman

nameMeanings.name: Reagh,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Ute.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Riabhach, which MacLysaght describes as an adjectival surname (meaning ‘gray’ or ‘brindled’) that ‘took the place of an hereditary one’.
Possibly an altered form of German   Rech  .

variants.name: Rech
meanings: German:
from an ancient Germanic personal name, Recho, a short form of a personal name composed with rāhha ‘revenge’.
variant of   Reh   ‘roe deer’.

nameMeanings.name: Lord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English laford, louerd, lord ‘lord, master’ (Old English hlāford), perhaps given to a someone who played the part of the lord or master of ceremonies in festival games.
Irish: adoption of the English name (see 1 above) as a translation of the main element of Gaelic Ó Tighearnaigh (see Tierney ) and Mac Thighearnáin (see McKiernan ).
Americanized form of French Laure, a variant of the personal name Laur 3.

variants.name: Tierney
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, John Patrick, Brigid, Clodagh, Kieran, Michael Sean, Siobhan.

Irish: shortened form of O'Tierney, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tíghearnaigh ‘descendant of Tighearnach’, a byname meaning ‘lord, master’. The Gaelic name is sometimes ‘translated’ as English Lord . Compare Tiernan .

variants.name: Lords
meanings: English: variant of Lord , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman, from orfe, a species of freshwater fish. Alternatively, a habitational name from Urff near Kassel, formerly Orpha.

variants.name: Orff
meanings: German: variant of   Orf  .

nameMeanings.name: Carbery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Scottish, Irish:  see  Carberry  .

variants.name: Carberry
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in the parish of Inveresk, Lothian, first recorded in the form Crebarrin, from Gaelic craobh ‘tree’ + barran ‘hedge’.
Irish (Waterford and Wexford, Armagh) and Manx: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Cairbre and Mac Cairbre ‘descendant of Cairbre’ and ‘son of Cairbre’, a byname probably meaning ‘charioteer’.

nameMeanings.name: Donal
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Earlier Domhnall , from Old Celtic dubno ‘world’ + val ‘rule’.

variants.name: Donall
meanings: Earlier Domhnall , from Old Celtic dubno ‘world’ + val ‘rule’.

nameMeanings.name: Maol
meanings: Found as a baptismal name, and corrupted from Mary.

en.lifeSummary: Donal Maol Mac Carthy Reagh, Lord of Carbery was born in 1214 as the son of Domhnall Got Mac Cárthaigh King of Desmond. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1310, at the age of 96.

fr.lifeSummary: Donal Maol Mac Carthy Reagh, Lord of Carbery est né en 1214, fils de Domhnall Got Mac Cárthaigh King of Desmond. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1310, à l’âge de 96 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Donal Maol Mac Carthy Reagh, Lord of Carbery wurde 1214, als Sohn von Domhnall Got Mac Cárthaigh King of Desmond geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1310 im Alter von 96 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Donal Maol Mac Carthy Reagh, Lord of Carbery è nato il nel 1214 come figlio di Domhnall Got Mac Cárthaigh King of Desmond. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1310, all'età di 96 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Donal Maol Mac Carthy Reagh, Lord of Carberyは1214年にDomhnall Got Mac Cárthaigh King of Desmondの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1310年に96歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Donal Maol Mac Carthy Reagh, Lord of Carbery(은)는 1214년 Domhnall Got Mac Cárthaigh King of Desmond의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1310년 96세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Donal Maol Mac Carthy Reagh, Lord of Carbery nasceu em 1214 filho de Domhnall Got Mac Cárthaigh King of Desmond. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1310, com 96 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Donal Maol Mac Carthy Reagh, Lord of Carbery родился в 1214 г. Его отца звали Domhnall Got Mac Cárthaigh King of Desmond. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1310 г. в возрасте 96 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Donal Maol Mac Carthy Reagh, Lord of Carbery nació en 1214 como hijo de Domhnall Got Mac Cárthaigh King of Desmond. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1310, a la edad de 96 años.
